summary: Phase 2 smoke test complete. All 6 backend endpoints (interview/start, interview/submit, interview/scorecard/pdf, interview/history, history/resumes, history/rewrites) return 200 with expected schema. Frontend full flow verified: intro splash, landing hero (purple-pink-orange gradient), signup -> dashboard, interview 5-question flow with next/prev, scorecard rendering with 4 metric cards + strengths/improvements/next-steps, PDF download triggered, History page with 3 tabs showing new interview item, and /resume regression loads OK. No console errors observed.
passed: POST /api/interview/submit -> 200 with scorecard containing overall_score, communication_score, technical_score, confidence_score, clarity_score, strengths[5], improvement_areas[6], per_question_feedback[5], verdict, next_steps[7] (LLM/Claude live)
Intro splash: 'TalentIQ' brand text visible on first load, fades out
Landing: hero renders with purple/pink gradient (no missing CSS classes), CTA buttons visible
Signup form -> /dashboard reached; card-interview and card-history present with LIVE labels
/interview: iv-role, iv-diff-medium, iv-start -> 5 iv-answer-N textareas, iv-next navigation, iv-submit -> iv-scorecard rendered
Scorecard contains all 4 metric labels: Communication, Technical, Confidence, Clarity
/history: history-tab-resumes, history-tab-rewrites, history-tab-interviews all present; 1 interview item shown after submission
/resume regression: page loads, no missing CSS classes after global color swap
action_items: Non-blocking note for main agent: /api/interview/submit expects answers as List[str] (positional by question order). The review request phrased it as 'answers[]' with objects {id, answer} -- the actual contract is list of plain strings. Frontend already sends the correct shape (verified end-to-end). Just confirm the OpenAPI/docs match.
notes: Test account: test+1782886287@talentiq.dev / Password123!. LLM (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY) is working - real scorecards returned with meaningful verdict/strengths/improvements text.
